title: Supplementary Material - Computational solutions for supporting systematic reviews in software engineering: a comprehensive overview
author: de Abreu Aguiar, Maria Fernanda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In the replication package you can find the data extraction form used in this mapping study. A data extraction form was created to gather all relevant data from the identified studies and manage the selection process in the systematic mapping. This catalog assists us in data extraction and synthesis procedures and can be used by potential interested parties, for example, for updating or replication.
